title: PMS Plush Highland Cow Soft Toy – 23cm Adorable Brown Highland Cattle Plushie – Fluffy & Cuddly Stuffed Animal for Gifting & Collectors
features: ADORABLE HIGHLAND COW PLUSHIE – A 23cm soft toy with fluffy brown fur, realistic horns, and a cute and cuddly design.
SUPER SOFT & HUGGABLE – Made from high-quality plush fabric, perfect for snuggling, gifting, or collecting.
PERFECT GIFT IDEA – An ideal birthday, Christmas, or special occasion gift for Highland cow lovers and plush toy enthusiasts.
SUITABLE FOR ALL AGES – A safe and comforting companion for children and a charming decorative plush for adults
SCOTTISH CHARM & CHARACTER – Captures the unique beauty of the iconic Highland cattle, making it a must-have collectible plush.
description: Product description Bring home a touch of Scottish charm with this adorable Plush Highland Cow! Designed with super soft, shaggy fur and realistic features, this 23cm cuddly toy is perfect for kids, adults, and Highland cow lovers alike. This fluffy stuffed animal captures the essence of the iconic Highland cattle, with its warm brown fur, cute horns, and irresistibly huggable design. Whether as a comforting bedtime companion, a decorative plushie, or a thoughtful gift, this plush cow is sure to bring smiles and warmth to any home. Perfect for birthdays, Christmas, and special occasions, this Highland Cow plush makes a wonderful collectible or keepsake. Add it to your plush toy collection or surprise someone special with this unique and loveable gift! Safety Warning Keep away from fire
